title: Hitchmate Cargo Stabilizer Bar for Truck Automotive Exterior Accessories - Small
description:
The steel ratchet powered cargo stabilizer is a great piece of hardware for keeping things in place. The lateral ratcheting system and rubber feet combination ensure no slip for stable support and preventing scratches on your bed. It can be put in place and taken down in a matter of seconds completely by hand, so you don't have to go looking for a tool. This Commercial Grade bar is the strongest Cargo Bar on the market so you don't have to worry about the weight of your cargo ever bending let alone breaking it. Note: Divider Bar sold separately.

Hitchmate Cargo Stabilizer Bar for Truck Automotive Exterior Accessories - Small

The steel ratchet powered cargo stabilizer is a great piece of hardware for keeping things in place. The lateral ratcheting system and rubber feet combination ensure no slip for stable support and preventing scratches on your bed.

Key Features

  • Universal Fit for all Trucks
  • Expandable: 50-65 inches
  • Heavy Duty Steel Ratchet Adjustment System
  • Zinc finish: Creates a Weatherproof Barrier, Resistant to Natural Elements
  • Rubber Feet to Prevent Scratches and Provide Excellent Grip on Side Walls

Product Specifications

  • MPN: HCSBB_SM
  • UPC: 616588370376
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Small

It can be put in place and taken down in a matter of seconds completely by hand, so you don't have to go looking for a tool. This Commercial Grade bar is the strongest Cargo Bar on the market so you don't have to worry about the weight of your cargo ever bending let alone breaking it.

Note: Divider Bar sold separately.
